TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Hbun-Qramay ga niya mki sku Sincik Keng atu Nahuy go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 109 buwan, 386 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 93% kyan ku 359 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 7% kyan ku 27 hi nya. maki qu ngasal bziran, ru kyokay. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Hbun-Qramay hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay 'zil na Hbun-Qramay hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Hbun-Qramay hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na Hbun-Qramay hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Hbun-Qramay hya' ga Cyocuy. tay mkyahu' na Hbun-Qramay hya' ga Hbun kramay. tay 'llaw na Hbun-Qramay hya' ga Qwayux. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ ħβun-qramaj ɣa nija mki s~ɕku s~ɕinʦ~ʨik keŋ atu naħuj ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku ** ħi nja. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ru kjokaj. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na ħβun-qramaj ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj ʔzil na ħβun-qramaj ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkjaħuʔ na ħβun-qramaj ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkrajaʔ na ħβun-qramaj ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na ħβun-qramaj ħjaʔ ɣa ʦ~ʨjoʦ~ʨuj. taj mkjaħuʔ na ħβun-qramaj ħjaʔ ɣa ħβun kramaj. taj ʔllaw na ħβun-qramaj ħjaʔ ɣa qwajux. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
S.FORM: alang Hbun-Qramay ga niya mki sku Sincik Keng atu Nahuy go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 109 buwan, 386 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 93% kyan ku 359 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 7% kyan ku 27 hi nya. maki qu ngasal bziran, ru kyokay. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Hbun-Qramay hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay 'zil na Hbun-Qramay hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Hbun-Qramay hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na Hbun-Qramay hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Hbun-Qramay hya' ga Cyocuy. tay mkyahu' na Hbun-Qramay hya' ga Hbun kramay. tay 'llaw na Hbun-Qramay hya' ga Qwayux. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ ħβun-qramaj ɣa nija mki s~ɕku s~ɕinʦ~ʨik keŋ atu naħuj ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku ** ħi nja. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ru kjokaj. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na ħβun-qramaj ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj ʔzil na ħβun-qramaj ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkjaħuʔ na ħβun-qramaj ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkrajaʔ na ħβun-qramaj ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na ħβun-qramaj ħjaʔ ɣa ʦ~ʨjoʦ~ʨuj. taj mkjaħuʔ na ħβun-qramaj ħjaʔ ɣa ħβun kramaj. taj ʔllaw na ħβun-qramaj ħjaʔ ɣa qwajux. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
